title: When the Earth Gives Up the Dead
original_title: When The Earth Gives Up The Dead
overview: In the Yorkshire village of Dunwich, a huge, deformed creature has been born. An evil priest and a mad professor attempt to use the creature to contact the old gods, Dagon and Cthulhu. As a result, all hell (literally) breaks loose. The third and final film in the 'Sekurig trilogy'.
